message:
perf(mux): add event-driven wakeup, writev, and thread safety improvements

- Add WakeSignal (eventfd/pipe) to replace sleep polling in render loop
- Use writev for WebSocket frame sends (header+payload in single syscall)
- Add writeFrameRawParts for zero-alloc prefix+payload sends
- Make global_server and has_pending_input atomic for thread safety
- Move broadcast sends outside mutex to reduce contention
- Use blocking accept instead of non-blocking polling with sleep
- Track active HTTP connections for clean shutdown ordering
- Remove browser-side connection delays (double rAF, resize timeout)
- Add rAF throttling for split divider drag
- Add comprehensive WASI stubs for zstd WASM instantiation
